title: HG Hob Cleaner Extra Strong, Effective Kitchen Degreaser & Induction Hob Cleaner & Protector, Safe for Electric & Gas Cookers, Safe Stove Top Cleaner, Fresh Fragrance & Maximum Shine - 250 ml
features: HG Hob Cleaner: Extra strong kitchen cleaner suitable for use as a ceramic hob cleaner, induction hob cleaner or gas hob cleaner. Features a fresh fragrance and leaves hobs looking shiny and clean
Removes stubborn grime and baked on food: HG kitchen hob cleaner safely and effectively removes stubborn grease, cooking rings, calcium, dirt, sauce splashes and cooked-on and burnt-on food

Protects your cooking appliance: Powerful yet gentle on surfaces, it leaves your cooktop with a grime-resistant, shiny layer. The protective layer helps guard against future food, oil and grease marks
Easy to use hob protector and cleaner: Apply with a cloth and rub into the surface. Wipe off with a damp cloth. Polish with a dry cloth. Use regularly to help keep your kitchen hygienically clean
Includes: 1 x HG Hob Cleaner Extra Strong, 250ml. Discover the full range of HG professional household cleaning products, including worktop cleaners, multi purpose cleaners and all surface cleaners
description: Product Description HG’s Hob Cleaner Extra Strong safely and effectively removes stubborn grease, grime, calcium, saucepan rings and cooked-on food on all types of induction and ceramic hobs. Induction hob safe, as well as being safe to use on electric or gas hobs, the powerful hob cleaning solution and induction hob protector has a fresh fragrance and gives a protective shine, leaving your cooker top looking new again! This maximum shine kitchen cleaner leaves a glossy protective layer, and can safely be used on glass cooktops as well as metal stoves, taking care of stubborn grime and grease from every hob - fast and effectively. Includes: 1 x Hob Cleaner Extra Strong (250ml bottle) How to use: 1. Apply with a cloth and rub the product onto the induction or ceramic hob 2. Then wipe off the hob with a clean and rinsed-out cloth 3. Polish to a shine with a dry cloth. Keep out of reach of children. Always read the label. Test on a discrete area before first use. Discover HG professional's wide range of specialist cleaning products and all purpose cleaner sprays for your home, office and outside space. Box Contains 1 x 250ml
